data.title: Energy Shares Follow Oil Prices Lower — Energy Roundup
data.description:
Energy shares were among the top losers Friday as oil futures declined, weighed down by renewed hopes of a Ukraine/Russia peace deal as Ukrainian leader Zelensky heads out for a meeting with President Trump in Mar-A-Lago over the weekend.

Sable Offshore stock tumbled after environmental groups filed a lawsuit in federal court on Wednesday to block the restart of oil pipelines near Santa Barbara, Calif. 




  Write to Paulo Trevisani at paulo.trevisani@wsj.com 



  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  December 26, 2025 17:39 ET (22:39 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Materials Shares Rise On Silver, Gold — Materials Roundup
data.description:
Materials stocks were among the few gainers among S&P 500 sectors, as silver and gold futures extended their rally amid escalating geopolitical tensions.

Silver futures have climbed 164% this year, blowing through a 45-year record in October. That included a jump of 7.7% on Friday alone, to notch the largest one-day and one-week dollar increases on record.

Freeport-McMoRan was named in a class-action lawsuit alleging the company misled investors by concealing inadequate safety at its Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia. 




  Write to Paulo Trevisani at paulo.trevisani@wsj.com 



  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  December 26, 2025 17:42 ET (22:42 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: NetEase Interactive Entertainment Group Head to Retire
data.description:
By Elias Schisgall 




  NetEase's head of its interactive entertainment group, Yingfeng Ding, is retiring at the end of the year. 



  Ding, who also holds an executive vice president title, will retire on Dec. 31 after 23 years at the Chinese internet and video games company. 



  He will remain a consultant to the company in 2026, NetEase said Friday. 



  The company did not share information about a search for Ding's successor. 





  Write to Elias Schisgall at elias.schisgall@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  December 26, 2025 16:37 ET (21:37 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.
